title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Stavanger, with a Z-Score of -3.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are extremely cold, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 12.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 82%, and the wind speed is moderate at 15.1 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
